## Summary

-

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance
- [ ] Database migration / data operation
- [ ] Deployment / infrastructure

## API / data impact

- [ ] No API contract changes
- [ ] Endpoint/schema changes documented
- [ ] Migration included and tested
- [ ] Backfill/import instructions included, if needed

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run python -m compileall app migrations tests`
- [ ] `uv run pytest tests/ -v --asyncio-mode=auto`
- [ ] Migration check, if applicable
- [ ] Not applicable / explained below

## Privacy and security checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No raw personal data added to fixtures, logs, screenshots, or docs
- [ ] Auth/API-key behavior reviewed, if touched
- [ ] CORS/public endpoint exposure reviewed, if touched
- [ ] Logging/analytics reviewed, if touched

## Notes for reviewers
